zh.lifeSummary: 當Mikhail Yaroslavich Duke Of Vladimir於1251年出生在俄羅斯Владимирская ОбластьВладимир弗拉基米爾時，他的父親Yaroslav III Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Tver and Vladimir21歲，母親Kseniya Mariya Yurevna Grand Duchess of Tver and Vladimir8歲。他於1294年11月8日與Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint"在俄羅斯Тверская ОбластьКалининский районТверь結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1318年11月22日在俄羅斯Владимирская ОбластьВладимир弗拉基米爾弗拉基米爾享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: Mikhail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Hebrew: ‘Who is like God?’ See Michael .

variants.name: Michael
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

nameMeanings.name: Duke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: In modern use this normally represents a coinage parallel to   Earl   and   King  , but it has been used as a short form of   Marmaduke   from at least the early 1600s.

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Mikhail Yaroslavich Duke Of Vladimir was born in 1251, in Vladimir, Vladimir, Vladimir Oblast, Russia, his father, Yaroslav III Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Tver and Vladimir, was 21 and his mother, Kseniya Mariya Yurevna Grand Duchess of Tver and Vladimir, was 8. He married Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint" on 8 November 1294, in Tver, Kalininskiy Rayon, Tver Oblast, Russia. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 22 November 1318, in Vladimir, Vladimir, Vladimir, Vladimir Oblast, Russia, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mikhail Yaroslavich Duke Of Vladimir est né en 1251, à Vladimir, Vladimir, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russie, son père, Yaroslav III Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Tver and Vladimir, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Kseniya Mariya Yurevna Grand Duchess of Tver and Vladimir, avait 8 ans. Il a épousé Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint" le 8 novembre 1294, à Tver', Kalininskiy Rayon, Tverskaya Oblastʹ, Russie. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 novembre 1318, à Vladimir, Vladimir, Vladimir, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russie, à l’âge de 67 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mikhail Yaroslavich Duke Of Vladimir è nato il nel 1251 nel Vladimir, Vladimir, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russia, il suo padre, Yaroslav III Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Tver and Vladimir, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Kseniya Mariya Yurevna Grand Duchess of Tver and Vladimir, aveva 8 anni. Lui sposato Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint" il 8 novembre 1294, nel Tver', Kalininskiy Rayon, Tverskaya Oblastʹ, Russia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Mikhail Yaroslavich Duke Of Vladimirが1251年にロシアВладимирская ОбластьВладимирvラディミールで生まれた時，父Yaroslav III Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Tver and Vladimirは21歳，母Kseniya Mariya Yurevna Grand Duchess of Tver and Vladimirは8歳であった。1294年11月8日にロシアТверская ОбластьКалининский районТверьでPrincess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint"と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1318年11月22日にロシアВладимирская ОбластьВладимирvラディミールvラディミールで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mikhail Yaroslavich Duke Of Vladimir(이)가 1251년 러시아 Владимирская Область Владимир 블라디미르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Yaroslav III Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Tver and Vladimir(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Kseniya Mariya Yurevna Grand Duchess of Tver and Vladimir(은)는 8세였다. 그는 1294년 11월 8일 러시아 Тверская Область Калининский район Тверь에서 Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint"(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1318년 11월 22일 러시아 Владимирская Область Владимир 블라디미르 블라디미르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mikhail Yaroslavich Duke Of Vladimir родился в 1251 г. в местности владимир, Владимир, Владимирская Область, Россия, его отцу по имени Yaroslav III Yaroslavich Grand Duke of Tver and Vladimir было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Kseniya Mariya Yurevna Grand Duchess of Tver and Vladimir, 8. Он женился на женщине по имени Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint" 8 ноября 1294 г. в местности Тверь, Калининский район, Тверская Область, Россия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 22 ноября 1318 г. в местности владимир, владимир, Владимир, Владимирская Область, Россия в возрасте 67 лет.
